ProjectFile.title: ProjectFile
ProjectFile.description: A template or custom file in the Primix compiler workspace

path.description: Unique virtual path of the file

platform.description: Target runtime or system, like 'win7', 'win10_11', 'linux', 'macos', or 'universal'

content.description: Source code content of the file

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp of last local or remote update

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: An interactive message exchanged with the Primix Copilot AI assistant

role.description: The author role, can be 'user' or 'model'

files/{fileId}.description: Managed code templates, script files or launch sequences in the workspace

chat/{messageId}.description: Historical chat conversation messages with the Gemini Primix Copilot
